examples.title: Basic usage
examples.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>
</m3e-autocomplete>
examples.mid:

    , Html.node "input" [] []
    ]
, M3e.Cem.Autocomplete.autocomplete [ M3e.Cem.Autocomplete.for "fruit" ]
    [ M3e.Cem.Option.option [] [ Html.text "Apples" ]

    , M3e.Cem.Option.option [] [ Html.text "Bananas" ]
    , M3e.Cem.Option.option [] [ Html.text "Grapes" ]

]

examples.title: Filter modes
examples.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="fruit5">Choose your favorite fruit</label>
  <input id="fruit5">
</m3e-form-field>
<m3e-autocomplete for="fruit5" filter="starts-with" case-sensitive="">
  <m3e-option>Apples</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Oranges</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Bananas</m3e-option>
  <m3e-option>Grapes</m3e-option>

examples.html:
<m3e-form-field>
  <label slot="label" for="state">State</label>
  <input id="state">
</m3e-form-field>

</m3e-autocomplete>

</m3e-autocomplete>

<m3e-badge for="btn" position="above-before">AB</m3e-badge>
<m3e-badge for="btn" position="below-before">BB</m3e-badge>
<m3e-badge for="btn" position="below-after">BA</m3e-badge>

<m3e-toolbar variant="vibrant" shape="rounded" elevated="">
  <m3e-icon-button>
    <m3e-icon name="arrow_back"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-icon-button>
  <m3e-icon-button>
    <m3e-icon name="arrow_forward"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-icon-button>
  <m3e-icon-button width="wide" variant="filled">
    <m3e-icon name="add"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-icon-button>
  <m3e-icon-button>
    <m3e-icon name="picture_in_picture"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-icon-button>
  <m3e-icon-button>
    <m3e-icon name="more_vert"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-icon-button>
</m3e-toolbar>
examples.top:
M3e.toolbar
    [ M3e.variantVibrant
    , M3e.shapeRounded
    , M3e.attrElevated True
    ]
    (M3e.Toolbar.children
        [ M3e.iconButton [] [ M3e.slotDefault (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "arrow_back" ] []) ]
        , M3e.iconButton [] [ M3e.slotDefault (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "arrow_forward" ] []) ]
        , M3e.iconButton
            [ M3e.widthWide
            , M3e.variantFilled
            ]
            [ M3e.slotDefault (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "add" ] []) ]
        , M3e.iconButton [] [ M3e.slotDefault (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "picture_in_picture" ] []) ]
        , M3e.iconButton [] [ M3e.slotDefault (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "more_vert" ] []) ]
        ]
    )
examples.mid:
M3e.Cem.Toolbar.toolbar
    [ M3e.Cem.Toolbar.variant M3e.Value.vibrant
    , M3e.Cem.Toolbar.shape M3e.Value.rounded
    , M3e.Cem.Toolbar.elevated True

examples.record:
M3e.Toolbar.view
    [ M3e.Toolbar.variant M3e.Value.vibrant
    , M3e.Toolbar.shape M3e.Value.rounded
    , M3e.Toolbar.elevated True
    ]
    (M3e.Toolbar.children
        [ M3e.Record.IconButton.view
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "arrow_back" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            []
            []
        , M3e.Record.IconButton.view
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "arrow_forward" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            []
            []
        , M3e.Record.IconButton.view
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "add" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            [ M3e.Record.IconButton.width M3e.Value.wide
            , M3e.Record.IconButton.variant M3e.Value.filled
            ]
            []
        , M3e.Record.IconButton.view
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "picture_in_picture" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            []
            []
        , M3e.Record.IconButton.view
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "more_vert" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            []
            []
        ]
    )
examples.build:
M3e.Toolbar.view
    [ M3e.Toolbar.variant M3e.Value.vibrant
    , M3e.Toolbar.shape M3e.Value.rounded
    , M3e.Toolbar.elevated True
    ]
    (M3e.Toolbar.children
        [ M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "arrow_back" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
        , M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "arrow_forward" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
        , M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "add" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            |> M3e.Build.IconButton.width M3e.Value.wide
            |> M3e.Build.IconButton.variant M3e.Value.filled
            |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
        , M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "picture_in_picture" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
        , M3e.Build.IconButton.iconButton
            { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "more_vert" ] []
            , action = M3e.Action.none
            }
            |> M3e.Build.IconButton.build
        ]
    )

examples.title: Plain tooltip
examples.html:
<m3e-icon-button id="button">
  <m3e-icon name="arrow_back"></m3e-icon>
</m3e-icon-button>
<m3e-tooltip for="button">Go Back</m3e-tooltip>
examples.record:
[ M3e.Record.IconButton.view
    { content = M3e.Icon.view [ M3e.Icon.name "arrow_back" ] []
    , action = M3e.Action.none
    }
    []
    []
, M3e.Record.Tooltip.view { content = Kit.text "Go Back" } [ M3e.Record.Tooltip.for "button" ] []
]

examples.title: Delays
examples.html:
<m3e-icon-button id="button">
  <m3e-icon name="arrow_back"></m3e-icon>
</m3e-icon-button>
<m3e-tooltip for="button" show-delay="0" hide-delay="200">Go Back</m3e-tooltip>
examples.top:
[ M3e.iconButton [] [ M3e.slotDefault (M3e.icon [ M3e.attrName "arrow_back" ] []) ]
, M3e.tooltip
    [ M3e.attrFor "button"
    , M3e.attrShowDelay 0
    , M3e.attrHideDelay 200
    ]
    [ M3e.slotDefault (Kit.text "Go Back") ]
]
